title: The Missing Movie
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a famous director's only copy of his secret film vanishes at the New Mouse City Film Festival, Geronimo and Hercule must catch the thief 🎬

q.en: What event is Geronimo asked to give the opening speech for?
q.zh: Geronimo 被邀请为哪个活动致开幕词？

options.en: The New Mouse City Film Festival
A birthday party for Madame No

explain.en: Mousella reminds Geronimo he agreed to give the opening speech for the first New Mouse City Film Festival.
explain.zh: Mousella 提醒 Geronimo，他答应担任首届新老鼠城电影节的开幕致辞嘉宾。

q.en: What role does Creepella von Cacklefur have at the festival?
q.zh: Creepella von Cacklefur 在电影节担任什么角色？

options.en: A judge who is an expert on scary movies

explain.en: Creepella says she will be one of the judges as the expert on scary movies.
explain.zh: Creepella 说她将作为恐怖片专家担任评委之一。

q.en: Whose secret movie was stolen from the safe?
q.zh: 谁的那部秘密电影被从保险柜里偷走了？

explain.en: Director Mousen Scorsese's top-secret movie was deleted from the projector and its only backup drive was taken from the safe.
explain.zh: 导演 Mousen Scorsese 那部绝密电影被从放映机删除，唯一的备份硬盘也被人从保险柜取走。

q.en: At what time were the security cameras disabled, marking the theft?
q.zh: 安保摄像头在几点被关闭，标志着盗窃发生？

explain.en: Creepella discovers the security cameras were disabled at 8:00 p.m. the day before, the time of the robbery.
explain.zh: Creepella 发现安保摄像头在前一天晚上 8 点被关闭，正是盗窃发生的时间。

q.en: How many copies of Mousen Scorsese's stolen movie existed?
q.zh: Mousen Scorsese 那部被盗电影原本有几份拷贝？

options.en: Only one, saved on the backup drive
options.zh: 只有一份，保存在备份硬盘里
一份都没有，电影没拍完

explain.en: Mousen admits it was the only copy; he wanted only one to make it seem extra top secret.
explain.zh: Mousen 承认那是唯一的拷贝，他想只留一份以显得格外绝密。

q.en: Which three rodents were on Hercule's list of suspects?
q.zh: Hercule 的嫌疑人名单上有哪三只老鼠？

options.en: Toasty Fontina, Ronaldo Crostini, and Albus Mackintosh
options.zh: Toasty Fontina、Ronaldo Crostini 和 Albus Mackintosh

explain.en: An article names three enemies of Mousen: Toasty Fontina, Ronaldo Crostini, and Albus Mackintosh, all at the festival.
explain.zh: 一篇文章列出了 Mousen 的三个仇人：Toasty Fontina、Ronaldo Crostini 和 Albus Mackintosh，三人都在电影节现场。

q.en: Who was the mysterious mouselet fan that actually stole the movie?
q.zh: 那位实际上偷走电影、假装成影迷的神秘小母鼠是谁？

options.zh: 一位来自夏威夷的游客

explain.en: The thief removes her wig, sunglasses, and dress to reveal she is Shadow, the most famous thief on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 小偷摘下假发、墨镜和裙子，露出她其实是 Shadow，老鼠岛上最有名的窃贼。

q.en: How did the detectives get footage of the thief committing the crime?
q.zh: 侦探们是如何拍到小偷作案画面的？

options.en: Trap's camera was left running by the changing room
options.zh: Trap 的摄影机落在更衣室旁一直开着

explain.en: Trap had forgotten his camera and left it running; it recorded the mouselet tampering with the camera and taking the keys.
explain.zh: Trap 忘了拿摄影机，机器一直开着，录下了小母鼠动摄像头和拿走钥匙的过程。

q.en: Whom was the thief planning to meet at the cafe?
q.zh: 小偷打算在咖啡馆和谁见面？

explain.en: A leopard-print car arrives and Madame No steps out to meet the thief, who had the stolen movie in her bag.
explain.zh: 一辆豹纹汽车驶来，Madame No 下车与小偷见面，小偷的包里正放着被盗电影。

q.en: What was Mousen Scorsese's secret movie really about?
q.zh: Mousen Scorsese 那部秘密电影究竟讲的是什么？

options.en: Exposing Madame No's EGO Industries pollution
options.zh: 揭露 Madame No 的 EGO 工业污染行为

explain.en: The film is 'Just Say No to Madame No: A Pollution Story,' showing EGO factories dumping waste, clearing forests, and polluting the air.
explain.zh: 这部电影名为《对 Madame No 说不：一个污染故事》，展示了 EGO 工厂倾倒废水、砍伐森林、污染空气。
